caveats: This prior is drawn from the NHD mainstem candidate, so it will agree with stationing by construction.
It does not identify actual visible water, shelves, side channels, islands, sandbars, eddies, boils, holes, or release-dependent wetted width.
The current pilot bbox clips the upstream and downstream station samples because the NHD source extract preserved whole features near and beyond the bbox edge.
promotion_gates: Use only as an editor overlay or mask-generation prior until reviewed river-mile stationing, banks, sandbars, and orthomosaic masks exist.
Do not replace the source-derived water mask or accept Colorado geometry from this prior alone.
Compare against NAIP, DEM relief, NHD waterbodies, Reclamation release context, NPS/GCMRC river-mile references, sandbars, and oarsman notes before deriving production wetted width.
